zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen de Ingoldisthorpe於1230年出生在英國素福爾可波斯莫時，她的父親Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II13歲，母親Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere30歲。她於1249年與Hugh Jernigan of Horham在英國素福爾可索莫利頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年在她的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen de Ingoldisthorpe was born in 1230, in Bosmere, Suffolk, England, her father, Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II, was 13 and her mother, Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere, was 30. She married Hugh Jernigan of Horham in 1249, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1271, in her hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen de Ingoldisthorpe est née en 1230, à Bosmere, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Jernigan of Horham en 1249, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1271, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

Sie hat 1249 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England Hugh Jernigan of Horham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1271 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen de Ingoldisthorpeが1230年にイギリススフォルクボスメアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe IIは13歳，母Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmereは30歳であった。1249年にイギリススフォルクソメルリートンでHugh Jernigan of Horhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen de Ingoldisthorpe(이)가 1230년 영국 수폴크 보스머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1249년 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에서 Hugh Jernigan of Horham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Hugh Jernigan of Horham em 1249, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1271, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ro.Raynham Hall, West Raynham, Norfolk, Eng: West Raynham, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen de Ingoldisthorpe родилась в 1230 г. в местности босмир, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe II было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella FitzHamon of Bosmere, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Jernigan of Horham в 1249 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1271 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

Se casó con Hugh Jernigan of Horham en 1249, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1271, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
